data.title: Apple's iPhone 16e To Drive Revenue Growth For Tim Cook's Company, Says Top Analyst
data.description: Deepwater Management's Gene Munster anticipates a revenue boost for Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) in FY25, driven by the newly launched iPhone 16e.

data.title: Palantir Plunges 5% After Hours As Alex Karp Plans $1.23 Billion Stock Sale, Cramer Urges 'Palanteers' For Support Amid Defense Cuts
data.description: Palantir Technologies Inc. shares tumbled over 5% on Wednesday in after-hours trading following reports of potential Pentagon budget cuts and CEO Alex Karp's new stock trading plan rattled investors, marking a sharp reversal for one of the market's top performers.

data.title: Peter Schiff Says Michael Saylor-Led Strategy's Convertible Debt Offerings 'Aren't Going Well' As Stock Falls Despite Bitcoin's Gain
data.description: Influential economist and market commentator Peter Schiff expressed concerns over Strategy Inc.‘s (NASDAQ:MSTR) convertible debt offerings on Wednesday, hinting at potential financial troubles for the Bitcoin (CRYPTO:

data.title: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella Warns Of Dot-com-Like AI Bubble, Pushes For Measuring AI Impact With GDP Growth: 'Self-Claiming AGI Milestone Is Just Nonsensical Benchmark Hacking'
data.description: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella compared the AI boom to the dot-com bubble, warning that the industry's success should be measured by real economic growth rather than hype-driven AGI milestones.
